tasks.label: Prisma Migrate Deploy Backend
tasks.command: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate deploy

tasks.label: Prisma Migrate Deploy Backend Localhost
tasks.command: $env:DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:12345@localhost:5432/cpa?schema=public'; Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate deploy

tasks.label: Check Prisma Tables In Container
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend node -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); (async () => { const c = new Client({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }); await c.connect(); const r = await c.query(\"SELECT to_regclass('public.solicitacao_cetic_log') AS solicitacao_cetic_log, to_regclass('public._prisma_migrations') AS prisma_migrations\"); console.log(r.rows[0]); await c.end(); })().catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); });"

tasks.label: Check Tables Via Psql
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d cpa -Atc "SELECT to_regclass('public.solicitacao_cetic_log'), to_regclass('public._prisma_migrations');"

tasks.label: Check Tables Via Psql Escaped
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T db psql -U postgres -d cpa -Atc 'SELECT to_regclass(''public.solicitacao_cetic_log''), to_regclass(''public._prisma_migrations'');'

tasks.label: Prisma Baseline Resolve Cetic Migration
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260511130000_add_solicitacao_cetic_log

tasks.label: Prisma Migrate Deploy In Backend Container
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate deploy
